projects.title: Caesar Wealth Management Trading Platform
projects.summary: Technical leadership of a large-scale wealth management trading platform managing the full trading flow across 20+ applications: quoting, orders, trades reporting, and execution.
projects.logic: Microservices ecosystem with event-driven integrations via Kafka, FIX protocol, Avro, and gRPC spanning the entire trade lifecycle.
responsibilities: Owned technical strategy and architecture across 20+ services in a microservices ecosystem
Designed and maintained event-driven integrations (Kafka, FIX, Avro, gRPC) spanning the entire trade lifecycle
Introduced spec-driven development process across the program with AI-assisted delivery
Led migration of legacy JavaScript UIs to modern TypeScript with improved UX

projects.title: Agentic AI Requirements Engineering System
projects.summary: Cloud-native microservices platform (15+ services, Azure) that transforms feature descriptions into structured requirements and actionable task breakdowns using orchestrated AI experts and GraphRAG.
projects.logic: Ensemble-of-experts pattern with Neo4j knowledge graphs, vector embeddings (3072 dims, cosine similarity), and multi-source document ingestion for context-aware generation.
responsibilities: Implemented ensemble-of-experts pattern for requirements generation with score-based self-evaluation
Built Graph RAG context retrieval backed by Neo4j knowledge graphs with vector embeddings
Engineered multi-source knowledge ingestion pipeline processing PDF, DOCX, XLSX, JIRA, and GitLab repos
Developed INVEST-compliant task breakdown with duplicate detection against existing backlogs
Integrated directly with GitLab for epic/issue creation with OAuth and bidirectional sync
Implemented real-time progress streaming via SSE for live agent thought visualization

projects.title: AI & Automation Tooling
projects.summary: Suite of AI-powered developer tools: fine-tuned LLMs for test generation, automated document processing, MCP server integration, and reusable CI/CD components for code review and quality.
projects.logic: Fine-tuned models for Playwright test creation, OCR-based PDF processing, and TypeScript MCP servers connecting agentic systems to GitLab CI/CD.

metrics.coverage: Code review + UI testing + triage + quality fixes

responsibilities: Fine-tuned LLMs to automate Playwright end-to-end test creation
Built Python microservice for automated processing and retrieval from unstructured PDFs using OCR and AI
Developed TypeScript MCP server integrating agentic systems into GitLab CI/CD pipelines
Created reusable CI/CD components for automatic code review, UI testing, test failure triage, and quality fixes

projects.title: Financial Services Platform Engineering
projects.summary: Designed and implemented Java/JavaScript application architectures for financial services clients. Owned the full delivery cycle from requirements gathering to production deployment, leading a team of 10+ engineers.
projects.logic: Full-cycle SOA architecture delivery for banking clients with CI/CD infrastructure and cross-discipline team leadership.
responsibilities: Led a team of 10+ developers and QA engineers across multiple financial service projects
Built core components and frameworks for financial applications
Designed and maintained CI/CD infrastructure pipelines
Acted as primary client liaison, translating business requirements into functional specifications
Mentored team members across engineering and QA disciplines

projects.title: Full-Stack Engineering & Team Leadership
projects.company: Various (Successful Dev, TopDev Group, ameria GmbH)
projects.summary: Progressed from developer to project manager across multiple companies, designing application architectures and leading small teams for PHP, Flex, and early Java web projects.
projects.logic: End-to-end application delivery including architecture design, client-server communication layers, domain modeling, and team management.
responsibilities: Managed teams of 2–5 developers with direct client communication
Designed application architectures and implemented core UI and server components
Defined business requirements and produced functional specifications
Implemented data transfer protocols and database structures
